title: Which fansub is the best
summary:
[]: Which fansub is the best?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 02, 2008 7:31 pm I've seen the Nyoro~N Subs version spread around, but I watched an ep of Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann subbed by them, and judging by the massive amount of cursing in it their translation style is rather loose, to say the least. Is their version good or should I look for a different one?

[]: Re: Which fansub is the best?     &

chunks.content:
Article: Which fansub is the best
[]: Which fansub is the best?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 02, 2008 7:31 pm I've seen the Nyoro~N Subs version spread around, but I watched an ep of Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann subbed by them, and judging by the massive amount of cursing in it their translation style is rather loose, to say the least. Is their version good or should I look for a different one?

[]: Re: Which fansub is the best?             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Sep 02, 2008 8:19 pm Nyoron subs used the script for rebuild to translate so personally Id go with them

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Sep 09, 2008 2:40 pm It's pretty good, the only problem is the hardsubbed karaoke they put in during the scenes where Angel of Doom and Showdown played (seriously, why on the flipping earth would you want that?)
